title: astragalus gladiatus
intro: Astragalus gladiatus, also known as the sword-shaped milk vetch, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus gladiatus include enhancing immune function, reducing fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as dried roots, capsules, or decoctions, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
